theme: First social surface — 'The commons, today' #today Dense band on /commons (the realigned per-cycle plan row 164, executed from the prepared build spec m512_e5_c164_first_social_surface_build_spec, ready_to_execute -> executed). The social layer is the open governance record itself: a stewardship ledger computed ONLY from what the registry records (who-not-how-many, zero fabricated metrics), a registry-wide freshness line, an anti-vanity honesty line, and the full horizon note — plus the Stage-3 wireframe page close (#join) and the c163 horizon-line hand-off retouch.
register: Tokyo Night dark-first; ledger rows reuse the SubnetworkCard surface treatment (--color-surface + --color-border, proven AA both modes one band up) at record density — no hover affordance, rows are records not teasers; all links underlined cyan --color-link (never purple on elevated dark); dl/dt/dd semantics for the fact grid; AVOID/LIFT register, zero marketing adjectives; no internal codenames on the public surface (the membership/federation substrate is described, not named).
operator_scope: Prepared-cycle execution (plan approved 2026-06-10): c164 only this session, per the build-spec artifact wound down at operator direction 2026-06-10. Commit-only through the decadal (deploy = c169 close or operator-flagged hotfix; /commons stays excluded per ADR-010 pending co-sign — live-404 re-verified at session open, post-T3-deploy). Session-start externals re-checked per spec §1: PR LatticeProtocol/aDNA#8 CLOSED-superseded (PR #7 merged 2026-06-10); LatticeProtocol/aDNA archived -> aDNA-Network/adna-legacy (frozen 74cb761) with new canonical aDNA-Network/aDNA — the install-truth flip was OWNED AND LANDED by the aDNALabs public-face session (4b419d3 ADR-034 + install-truth re-cut; 21afbce deployed live + verified) during this session's plan-approval gap, so the spec's 'if merged -> regen fixture' conditional was discharged by that session, not c164. Hestia vault-card memo still open (no sync:vaults regen). Spec §2 data recon re-verified before build.

iii_7step.measure: Baseline: /commons ended at #connect with the ClosingCTA inside the connect band — no social surface anywhere on the site; the Stage-3 wireframe's 'commons, today' Dense band and 'Join & steward' close were the two unbuilt blocks. Data truth (re-verified at open): subnetworks.json carries steward x4, attribution + license on the Wilhelm pair only, cite + canonical_governance x4; vaults.json (41 vaults / 18 edges) carries member personas (Hygieia, Mnemosyne; wga + ContextCommons null), last_synced 2026-05-24 x4, three member edges (WilhelmAI umbrella->RareArchive, federation->SiteForge.aDNA + III.aDNA), and NO activity fields (recent_closed/current_phase/headline_mission all null) — no feed fabricable, none faked.
iii_7step.orient: The design-spec Dense-band brief and the Movement-Skeptic guard converge: the only honest social surface today is the governance record itself, shown plainly. Who-not-how-many = named stewards, named attribution, named terms, named relationships; 'activity' = the registry's real dates, nothing else. The horizon (profiles/follows/feeds/shared governance) is named once, fully, as not-built — moving the c163 horizon sentence's job into the band and pointing the connect line down at it.
iii_7step.select_iterate: (1) #today band after #connect (bg-alt alternation; scroll-margin-top anchor discipline): frontmatter joins the subnetworks overlay to the vault registry (members[].vault_slug -> vault record; declaredRelationships() walks edges both directions, phrasing per type — umbrellas X / under the X umbrella / federates A, B; E4 mixed-id gotcha honored via registry-index lookup with raw-id fallback). Stewardship ledger: 4 dense rows — name -> /vaults/[slug]/, steward (persona appended ONLY when not already in the steward string — no duplication, no invention), attribution + license rendered only where the record exists, canonical_governance in code, declared relationships only where edges exist (wga/ContextCommons honestly bare, no placeholder). (2) Registry-wide freshness line: generated_at + deduped member last_synced dates — honest activity = dates + declared edges. (3) Anti-vanity line: contributor counts/stars/followers named as NOT shown because the registry doesn't record them. (4) Horizon Callout (variant info, 'The horizon'): profiles/follows/feeds/shared governance = not built yet, designed on the membership/federation substrate; no internal codename. (5) #join close: ClosingCTA moved out of #connect, title 'Join & steward' + lead carrying the ethos line relocated from band 1 (the wireframe puts ethos at the close; stated once). (6) connect-horizon retouch: second sentence -> hand-off link to #today.
iii_7step.implement: site/src/pages/commons.astro ONLY (+246/-19): Callout + vaults.json imports, ledger compute block, #today band, #join close, band-1 ethos paragraph removed (relocated), connect-horizon retouch, styles (today-ledger/today-row/today-facts dl grid + responsive label-over-value stack at 760px; commons-join page-end air; .connect-horizon a joined to the cyan link group; .commons-ethos CSS removed with its element). Commit 06873fc.
iii_7step.re_measure: npm run build 163pp/0err (no new routes). Gates 121/121 first run — count moved 120->121 via the public-face session's install-truth re-cut (4b419d3, not this cycle); gate-4 axe AA both modes green incl. the new band on /commons; gate-9 responsive green incl. commons at 5 viewports.
iii_7step.validate: dist checks: #today + #join anchors present; all 26 internal hrefs on /commons resolve incl. the 4 member vault-detail pages; no 'Venus' string; no archived-repo slug; ethos appears exactly once (the close); umbrella/federates/inbound-umbrella phrases all render from the registry. Dark-mode 1440px evidence shots eyeballed (evidence/c164_screens/, gitignored): ledger rows compose at record density; Join & steward close = hairline rule + title + ethos lead + button pair.
iii_7step.record: this JSON + design-spec per-cycle row c164 ✅ + mission O3 progress note + build-spec artifact status ready_to_execute -> executed + Seshat coord-memo ack + session SITREP + STATE refresh at session close.

change_summary: site/src/pages/commons.astro — #today 'The commons, today' Dense band: stewardship ledger (4 rows: linked name, steward/persona, attribution + license where non-null, governance record, declared edge relationships; wga/ContextCommons honestly bare), registry-wide freshness line (generated_at + last_synced), anti-vanity honesty line, horizon Callout (variant info, 'The horizon' — profiles/follows/feeds/shared governance named as not built; no internal codenames).

site/src/pages/commons.astro — #join 'Join & steward' close (Stage-3 wireframe): ClosingCTA moved out of #connect with title/lead props; lead carries the ethos line relocated from band 1 (stated once, at the close, where the wireframe puts it).
site/src/pages/commons.astro — connect-horizon retouch: second sentence replaced with a hand-off link down to #today (the page states the horizon once, fully, in the band).
Page order now exactly the Stage-3 wireframe: hero -> featured -> connect -> commons-today -> join/steward close; band backgrounds alternate alt/plain/alt/plain.

doctrine_compliance.reuse_over_invention: PASS — no new component (4 static rows stay inline per Design-DNA); ledger rows reuse the SubnetworkCard surface tokens; Callout + ClosingCTA reused as built; zero new color declarations.
doctrine_compliance.two_fighting_colors: PASS — cyan link signal only in the band (underlined, both modes); purple appears only in the reused ClosingCTA primary button (.btn utilities own it).
doctrine_compliance.dark_first: PASS — gate-4 axe AA both modes green; card surface = the AA-proven SubnetworkCard pair (--color-surface + --color-border).
doctrine_compliance.no_invented_routes: PASS — every ledger link is a real /vaults/[slug]/ page (4/4 verified in dist); in-page anchors only otherwise.
doctrine_compliance.honest_showcase: PASS — zero fabricated metrics: attribution/license render only where the record exists; members without edges render nothing (no placeholder); 'activity' = real registry dates; the anti-vanity line says what is NOT shown and why; the horizon note names profiles/follows/feeds/shared governance as not built yet.
doctrine_compliance.avoid_register: PASS — LIFT register, zero marketing adjectives; no internal codenames on the public surface.
doctrine_compliance.engine_untouched: PASS — skills/gates/generators/data unedited; nav untouched (C3 = c165); prebuild's UTC-midnight date-only churn of vaults.json/subnetworks.json (generated_at 06-10 -> 06-11, 1 line each, substance identical) was restored to committed bytes pre-commit rather than committed as drive-by data churn.
doctrine_compliance.hard_cap: PASS — one cycle; prepared-spec scope honored (§8 non-goals all held).

deploy: NONE — commit-only per the resolved deploy cadence (decadal-close + operator-flagged hotfix path); /commons remains excluded from production until the c169 coordinated close-deploy (ADR-010 co-sign pending; live-404 re-verified this session after the public-face T3 deploy).
findings: build_vaults_data.mjs lacks the install-truth script's strip-compare churn guard: any build after UTC midnight rewrites vaults.json + subnetworks.json with a date-only generated_at diff (substance identical). Restored pre-commit this session. Candidate small upstream fix (mirror the sibling script's generated-field strip) — backlog at a natural pause.
ADR-034 was taken by the public-face session (adr_034_public_face_repo_release_architecture) — the E5 subnetworks-overlay ADR candidate renumbers when it ratifies at c169.
Gate count baseline is now 121 (install-truth re-cut added one case); c165+ sessions should expect 121, not 120.
next: cycle 165 — homepage §5 hand-off (front_page_doctrine line 117: the 'Join the network' tease points at the live /commons) + C3 nav/orphans incl. the /commons nav entry (mind the E4 c158 7th-nav-item desktop overflow at 768px; gate-9 guards it).
